title: Spandeck Engineering (S) Pte Ltd v Defence Science & Technology Agency
text: Proof-of-concept sandbox summary (paraphrased from public information; not authoritative text). The Singapore Court of Appeal set out a single test for the imposition of a duty of care in negligence for both physical damage and pure economic loss. The test is a two-stage inquiry of legal proximity and policy considerations, applied incrementally and preceded by a threshold requirement of factual foreseeability. Spandeck is the leading Singapore authority on the duty of care in negligence.
